_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Motif enrichment analysis revealed overrepresentation in consensus binding sites of growth-promoting factors, Fra-1/AP1, Sox2/10 and Stat3, within TEAD1 peaks
details: Successfully identified overrepresentation of consensus binding sites of growth-promoting factors Fra-1/AP1, Sox2/10 and Stat3 within TEAD1 peaks through motif enrichment analysis
